vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách
vocab.example: Looking back, my school played a pivotal role during my formative years, shaping my values and outlook on life.

vocab.meaning: sự chăm sóc đời sống tinh thần và tình cảm cho học sinh
vocab.example: The school was exceptional in its pastoral care, ensuring that every student felt emotionally supported and heard.

vocab.meaning: các hoạt động theo đuổi ngoại khóa
vocab.example: What made me truly fond of my school was the sheer variety of extracurricular pursuits, from debate club to archery.

vocab.meaning: tinh thần ham học hỏi, sự tò mò về trí tuệ
vocab.example: My teachers were masters at fostering intellectual curiosity rather than just forcing us to memorize facts.

vocab.word: a sense of esprit de corps
vocab.meaning: tinh thần đồng đội, sự đoàn kết trong một tập thể
vocab.example: There was a remarkable sense of esprit de corps among the students, especially during the annual sports competitions.

vocab.meaning: sự khắt khe/nghiêm ngặt trong học thuật
vocab.example: While I enjoyed the social aspect, I sometimes found the academic rigor quite taxing as a young child.

vocab.meaning: môi trường nuôi dưỡng và hỗ trợ
vocab.example: I feel incredibly lucky to have grown up in such a nurturing environment where creativity was highly encouraged.
The school adopted a multidisciplinary approach to learning, which made every subject feel interconnected and interesting.

vocab.meaning: hồi tưởng, nhớ lại một cách hạnh phúc
vocab.example: My old classmates and I still meet up to reminisce about the mischievous things we did during recess.

vocab.meaning: nền giáo dục toàn diện (cả kiến thức lẫn kỹ năng)
vocab.example: The institution provided a well-rounded education that prepared us for the complexities of the real world.
